sn.s: Ich mues mit em Bus i d'Stadt.
sn.e: I have to take the bus into town.

sn.s: An de Haltestell lueg ich uf de Plan.
sn.e: At the bus stop I look at the schedule.

sn.s: De Bus chunnt, und ich stiig ii.
sn.e: The bus comes, and I get on.
"Hello, one ticket to the centre, please."

sn.s: Ich zale und sueche mer e Platz.
sn.e: I pay and find myself a seat.

sn.s: "Mues ich umstiige?" frag ich e Frau.
sn.e: "Do I have to change?" I ask a woman.

sn.s: "Nei, das isch de direkt Bus," seit sie.
sn.e: "No, this is the direct bus," she says.

sn.s: "Grad da vorne, Sie chönd use," seit sie.
sn.e: "Right up ahead, you can get out," she says.
"Thank you very much for the help!"

sn.s: Ich stiig us und bi mitten i de Stadt.
sn.e: I get off and I'm in the middle of town.

sn.s: De Bus z'Luzärn isch eifach und pünktlich.
sn.e: The bus in Lucerne is simple and punctual.

sn.s: Langsam find ich mich z'rächt da.
sn.e: Slowly I'm finding my way here.
